findings.description: The knowledge file omits `doc/` and `src/` sub-folder entries for each of the four sample directories: `fw_integration_sample/log4j/`, `fw_integration_sample/smime/`, `fw_integration_sample/wmq/`, and `log_statistics_sample/`. The source explicitly lists these sub-folders with descriptions indicating `doc/` contains usage documentation and `src/` contains source code.
findings.source_evidence: Source rows: log4j/doc/ — 'サンプルの設定、使用方法についての解説書が格納されています'; log4j/src/ — 'サンプルのソースコードが格納されています' (same pattern repeated for smime/, wmq/, log_statistics_sample/)
